label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out what date is one week from the last day of 1899. The last day of 1899 would be December 31, 1899. If we add one week to that date, we need to add seven days. Let me count day by day to be sure. Starting from December 31, 1899: 1 day later would be January 1, 1900 (the next day). 2 days later would be January 2, 1900. 3 days later would be January 3, 1900. 4 days later would be January 4, 1900. 5 days later would be January 5, 1900. 6 days later would be January 6, 1900. 7 days later would be January 7, 1900. So, adding one week to December 31, 1899 would result in January 7, 1900. Let me check the options given to see if that's there. Looking at the options, option D is 01/07/1900,
